content: The W3C specification and libpng-hosted PNG Second Edition agree that a non-colour-managed decoder should use gAMA/cHRM when iCCP is present; a decoder supporting sRGB should use its implied values rather than conflicting gAMA/cHRM. This supports a staged eager-decoder design: parse/validate metadata now, apply only demonstrably correct transforms, and make iCCP support explicit rather than silently discard it.
